title: View File/Picture attachments in WorkFiles rather than downloading
excerpt: View File/Picture attachments in WorkFiles rather than downloading. Would love to have the pictures just visible in the WorkFile itself rather than download and view. We use this for audits and it’s extremely time consum…

posts.author: tfemeyer (Tina Femeyer )
posts.cookedHtml: View File/Picture attachments in WorkFiles rather than downloading. Would love to have the pictures just visible in the WorkFile itself rather than download and view. We use this for audits and it’s extremely time consuming to have so many click points to view all the information.

posts.author: Nachliel (Nachliel from Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @tfemeyer

Nachliel from Easyapps here

I am not sure this is what you mean, but are you trying to embed images and files in your forms?

If so, our Monday form builder app, Easyform, supports HTML in the form description and each form question description. This includes iframes, allowing you to embed YouTube videos, Google Docs, etc.

Example of adding an image to the form description:

In addition to that, we offer:

  • Connected Board support:
    • Limiting selection to a single item.
    • Displaying items from multiple connected boards.
    • Limiting select options to items from specific boards where a column is connected to multiple boards.
    • Pro plan feature - item default values support - set default values for connected board columns hidden in the form.
  • Upload files to your board’s file columns, with support for:
    • Allowing only specific file types, such as images or pdf.
    • Limiting the number of files that can be uploaded.
    • Setting a maximum for file size.
    • Manually retrying uploads if some or all of them fail.
  • Set default values for the response item’s hidden group, status, connected board, and dropdown columns. To do so, select Item default values from the Settings menu.
  • Add the item’s group as just another field to the form.
  • Control the page’s top margin with the ability to set different values for desktop and mobile. To do so, select Page from the Settings menu.

If you’re interested in creating styled forms that better match your brand and embed perfectly on your web page, you can check out our Monday.com app Easyform and our extensive documentation site.

You can set up a free demo here or contact us at support@easyappshq.com.

Here is an example of our form in action:

I hope this helps,

Nachliel

posts.author: tfemeyer (Tina Femeyer )
posts.cookedHtml: We want the person filling out the form to be able to upload a photo in the form response. And then for the person reviewing the form response to be able to see the form with those pictures in the form, not to have to download each picture individually.

posts.author: mavishp (MAVISH Prasad)
posts.cookedHtml: I have been waiting for a resolve for this since 2022. No fixes to this, all i get told is that it will be taken into consideration. It should be a simple fix as their forms Response viewer (beta) has the ability to show signatures now instead of having to download them to view, but the image attachments still are the same. This is now basically getting my entire team to find another provider and take our entire setup somewhere more appreciated.
